---
title: "Djovan Velasco"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/djovan-velasco/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Djovan-Velasco
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      url: "mailto:djovan@icloud.com"
    - text: Resume
      href: "USC Res-2.pdf"
toc: false
---

Intro

## Education

University of California, Los Angeles \| Los Angeles, CA B.S in Statistics and Data Science \| September 2023 - June 2026

## Experience
